meaning: n.富士山(在日本本州岛上的死火山)
examples: He is an employee of Fuji Bank.
Mt. Fuji has a graceful shape.
The classic cone shapes of a Fuji or Kilimanjaro are created when erupting magma piles up.
Fuji survived the transition from film to digital photography, even though Kodak went bankrupt.
It's a well-disguised Subaru WRX built in Japan by GM partner Fuji Heavy Industries.
